# User & Team Preferences
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by memory-write.py — do not edit directly. Source of truth: memory.db -->

Preferences discovered during interactions. Skills should apply these automatically without re-asking.

## How to use
- Read this file at the start of every skill
- Apply preferences silently (don't announce "I see you prefer X")
- Add new preferences when the user expresses a clear preference
